programme.desc: Adam Henson is hoping one of his pregnant pigs will boost the future of the rare Large Black breed, and JB Gill reveals the Young Farmer of the Year. Plus, Rob and Dave rescue a rejected lamb

programme.title: Intruder
programme.desc: Rebecca decides she and Sam must plan a speedy escape, and Bailey is on the cusp of finding the vital evidence she needs. However, the apathy of her bosses means she must confront the evil alone. Thriller, starring Elaine Cassidy, Tom Meeten and Sally Lindsay

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War with the Law
programme.desc: All available guards are urgently deployed when a Code 21 emergency call comes into the control room in West Orchards shopping centre in Coventry after a shoplifter runs out of a store after stealing a pair of trainers. Meanwhile, Lewis and dog handler Keith race to violent incident outside of the shopping centre after a fight breaks out inside a betting shop

programme.title: Police Suspect No 1
programme.desc: Detective Inspector Burgess of Norwich CID has a problem, the number of home burglaries has rocketed and there are more and more victims emerging every day. Looking at the evidence, officers suspect that one man is potentially responsible for a large part of the spike in residential crime, but he is a highly experienced criminal who knows every way to escape capture and avoid leaving any clue that could incriminate him

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Footage reveals horrifying abuse of homeless people caught on CCTV. Plus, terrorists planning a murderous attack are unaware their preparations were being caught on camera

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The pals announce resolutions for the coming year and Chandler enlists Joey's help so he can kiss Monica at midnight during a New Year's Eve party. American comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courtney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed by the fake laugh Chandler uses at work whenever his boss cracks a joke, and the gang gets a shock when Ross introduces his new girlfriend

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: For 17 years from 1981 to 1998, the Humber Bridge was the longest single-span suspension bridge in the world, and many consider it to be Britain's most beautiful. Rob Bell discovers the facts about its groundbreaking construction, why it took so long to build and how it changed the lives of the people of Hull and North Lincolnshire

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Nick's Quest
programme.desc: Roving naturalist Nick Baker encounters endangered mountain gorillas in the wilds of Uganda's dense Bwindi Forest. These great apes account for half of their species' entire population - and one group in particular has become accustomed to humans

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers her advice on making first impressions really count, visiting a couple in East Sussex who are desperate to sell their unappealing Bournemouth home and move to Australia

programme.title: The SpongeBob SquarePants Movie (2004)
programme.desc: The plucky sea creature sets out to prove his boss Mr Krabs is innocent of stealing Neptune's crown. However, the missing item has ended up in sinister Shell City, which all sea-dwellers fear and from which few have ever returned. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny, Bill Fagerbakke, Clancy Brown and Scarlett Johansson, plus a cameo appearance by David Hasselhoff

programme.title: Monster Trucks (2016)
programme.desc: A drilling operation unleashes a subterranean creature which feeds on oil. The monster bonds with a monster truck which a local teenager is building from spare parts, and the youngster befriends the beast and helps it to return to its underground home. Fantasy adventure, starring Lucas Till and Jane Levy

programme.title: Puss in Boots (2011)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling feline joins forces with a cunning thief and a treacherous old friend to steal a magical golden goose from a giant's castle. He must save the day when it transpires that their actions have unleashed a terrible danger on his home town. Animated comedy spin-off from the Shrek movies, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: A TV reporter investigating a presidential misdemeanour stumbles on evidence that a comet is on a collision course with Earth, threatening the future of the human race. Meanwhile, an astronaut prepares to lead his crew on a do-or-die mission to intercept the danger. Sci-fi drama, starring Robert Duvall, Tea Leoni, Morgan Freeman and Elijah Wood

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: After Mitch Rapp's girlfriend Katrina accepts his wedding proposal during an idyllic European beach holiday, they and many others are gunned down by terrorists. Mitch survives and becomes a master of unarmed combat before the US government consider using him for black ops. Action thriller, starring Dylan O'Brien, Michael Keaton and Sanaa Lathan

programme.title: It's All About Love (2002)
programme.desc: A man living in a strange future world gets more than he bargained for when he agrees to meet his estranged wife and sort out their divorce once and for all. It's not long before he realises something mysterious is afoot, plunging them both into peril. Sci-fi romance, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Claire Danes, Douglas Henshall and Sean Penn

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes (1985)
programme.desc: The teenage detective and his future sidekick Watson meet for the first time at boarding school. The death of Holmes's mentor sets the youngsters on their first case, and they discover that former members of an archaeological survey team have died under suspicious circumstances - pointing to a sinister Egyptian cult using hallucinogenic poisons to kill its victims. Adventure, starring Nicholas Rowe, Alan Cox and Sophie Ward

programme.title: Stuart Little 2 (2002)
programme.desc: The plucky talking mouse feels left out when the son of his adopted human family makes a new pal - but quickly forgets such trifling matters when his high-flying canary friend is captured by an evil falcon, prompting the brave rodent to mount a daring rescue. Family adventure sequel, with Geena Davis, Hugh Laurie and Jonathan Lipnicki, and the voices of Michael J Fox, Melanie Griffith and James Woods

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel

programme.title: Baby Boom (1987)
programme.desc: A successful New York consultant is made the guardian of her dead cousin's baby daughter. At first she plans to put the child up for adoption, but finds herself unable to go through with it and reluctantly takes on the role of mother - a decision that throws her personal and professional lives into turmoil. Comedy, starring Diane Keaton, Harold Ramis, Sam Shepard and Sam Wanamaker

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after the Pan Pacific Defense Corps unleashed an army of Jaegers - 25-storey tall robots operated by mind-melded humans - former pilot Jake Pentecost is contacted by estranged sister Mako Mori. She implores him to return to the PPDC to head off the threat posed by Liwen Shao, chief executive of Shao Industries, who intends to replace the Jaegers with unmanned drones. Haunted by ghosts of the past, Jake eventually agrees to mentor a 15-year-old cadet called Amara, whose family were crushed to death during one monster attack. Director Steven S DeKnight's literally blockbusting sci-fi sequel, starring John Boyega, Scott Eastwood and Cailee Spaeny

programme.title: The Equalizer 2 (2018)
programme.desc: Robert McCall divides his time between cab driving and looking after a young man who is mixing with a bad crowd. When a CIA friend is murdered, the former black ops agent sets out to avenge her death, and winds up fighting for survival in his hurricane-battered home town. Action thriller, starring Denzel Washington, Pedro Pascal and Ashton Sanders

programme.title: Rules Don't Apply (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring actress and an ambitious young driver fall for one another while working for eccentric billionaire Howard Hughes. Romantic comedy, written, directed by and starring Warren Beatty, with Lily Collins, Haley Bennett and Alden Ehrenreich

programme.title: How I Live Now (2013)
programme.desc: An American teenager is sent to stay with relatives in rural Britain, and falls in love with a local boy. Reports start to come in of conflict erupting in Europe, and as events escalate into a Third World War, she finds herself a fugitive living in a dangerous military police state. Thriller based on Meg Rosoff's novel, starring Saoirse Ronan and Tom Holland

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)
programme.desc: The cheery sea creature tries to prevent a precious secret formula from falling into the wrong hands - but when it goes missing, the end of the world approaches. SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Two by Two (2015)
programme.desc: Two strange creatures and their children are barred from getting on board Noah's Ark, but manage to sneak in. When the kids fall overboard, they face a struggle for survival as the flood waters rise, while their distraught parents must work together to rescue them. Animated adventure, with the voices of Tara Flynn and Dermot Magennis

programme.title: Teen Wolf (1985)
programme.desc: A teenage misfit is initially dismayed to learn he is a werewolf as a result of a hereditary curse. He finds there are advantages as he becomes a local celebrity, while his enhanced agility makes him the star player of his school's basketball team - but fame quickly goes to his head. Comedy, starring Michael J Fox, James Hampton and Susan Ursitti

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight (2017)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots and their human allies face a confrontation with their original creator, who has brainwashed their leader and intends to save her own home planet by destroying Earth. To save the human race they must recover an ancient artefact from Arthurian legend - but their mission is threatened by old enemies as they uncover a terrible secret about the history of the world. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Mark Wahlberg, Anthony Hopkins, Gemma Chan, Stanley Tucci and John Turturro

programme.title: Commando (1985)
programme.desc: The daughter of retired special forces officer John Matrix is kidnapped by an old comrade-in-arms, now in league with a deposed former dictator. The tyrant plans to use the girl to force Matrix into assassinating the head of the country he once ruled, but is unprepared for the lengths to which the veteran soldier will go to rescue his child. Action adventure, with Arnold Schwarzenegger and Rae Dawn Chong

programme.title: Overlord (2018)
programme.desc: In 1944, a group of American soldiers land in an occupied French hamlet after their plane is destroyed by enemy fire. Their mission is to take out a heavily fortified Nazi radio tower hours before D-Day. However, they stumble across a mysterious Nazi lab where their bloodthirsty enemies are waiting for them. Action thriller from producer JJ Abrams, starring Jovan Adepo, Wyatt Russell and Mathilde Ollivier

programme.title: The Raid 2 (2014)
programme.desc: A cop who survived fighting his way through a drug lord's lair is reassigned to undercover duties. He is sent to infiltrate a crime syndicate and expose a connection between the gangsters and corruption on the force, but his personal vendetta threatens to disrupt the mission. Action thriller sequel, starring Iko Uwais and Arifin Putra. In Indonesian, Japanese, English and Arabic

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: When both sides of the family turn up for Easter, everyone must learn to appreciate each other's cuisines. Comedy, starring Anthony Anderson and directed by Eva Longoria

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: When Andre Jr is accepted by both Howard and Stanford universities, Dre tries to convince him to attend his alma mater. Jack develops a comedy style and Ruby decides she's going to manage his career, forcing Diane to compete for her attention

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley makes a bet with Ben that he cannot get a second date with Heather, but when she fails to jump at the chance to go out with him again, Ben resorts to desperate measures to win the wager. Bonnie meets a handsome stranger and considers ending her relationship with Brad. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau and Chelsea Kane

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker acts like a lawyer in front of his father because he has forgotten to tell him he has dropped out of law school and works in TV. Meanwhile, Riley has a crush on a British guy, but Bonnie mistakenly thinks she has fallen for Danny. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When bad weather closes the school, Murray makes Adam and Barry shovel snow off the path, but the boys take advantage of their dad when they discover that he has a fear of snow. Beverly finds Erica's college application, in which she praises her mother as her hero, but Erica is far from pleased about it. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to join the school tennis team in order to stay close to his best friend Chad. However, when Chad picks Dave Kim as his doubles partner, Adam vows to team up with Barry to beat them in a match. Beverly helps Erica to get through her post-break-up depression in time for Valentine's Day. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While attempting to catch a drug dealer, Peralta and Boyle reluctantly join forces with Agent Jack Danger, a pompous investigator at the US Postal Inspection Service. Meanwhile, the other officers try to help Santiago conquer her cravings and give up smoking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Raj organise a stag party for Howard, but stories about his sexual history are unwittingly revealed, and he has to persuade bride-to-be Bernadette not to call off the wedding. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg and Kunal Nayyar

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard tries to use his wedding as an excuse to avoid being sent into space, but ends up accepting the mission. Amy plots to get Sheldon to take the next step in their relationship, while Leonard accidentally asks Penny to marry him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is given the chance to square off against the one actor from the Star Trek franchise he holds a grudge against - Wil Wheaton. Meanwhile, Leonard asks Penny to set Howard up on a date with one of her friends. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As the academic year comes to a close, Barry and Erica wonder how they will appear in the school yearbook and pressure Adam, who is on the team producing it, to see the rough layout before it goes to print. Murray is annoyed when Marvin pays a visit to ask for money. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica cannot wait to get out of the house as Graduation Day approaches - until it dawns on her how much her mother's affection means to her. Barry's plans for a summer with Lainey turn to dust, while Dana makes an unexpected visit. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Hayley Orrantia

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: As the wedding of Gina's mother and Boyle's father arrives, each member of the squad is given a task to complete for the big day. However, Peralta and Santiago get sidetracked chasing a criminal, and Jeffords struggles to officiate at the ceremony. Comedy, guest starring Sandra Bernhard and Nick Cannon

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake's seldom-seen father Roger arrives to spend some time with his son, but Charles is sceptical of his true motives. Meanwhile, Holt tests Amy, Terry, Gina and Rosa with a near-impossible brain teaser in exchange for tickets to a Beyonce concert. Guest starring Bradley Whitford (The West Wing)

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples' final commitment ceremony is staged and as they try to process Charlene's revelations about her husband's behaviour on the boys' night out, the fallout continues into another explosive affair

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Below Deck Mediterranean
programme.desc: Tension arises between Adam and Hannah over communication, while Kasey and Joao continue flirting as Brooke develops a crush on Adam

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard announce that they are moving in together, prompting Sheldon to revisit 2003, a much simpler time before he had met either of them. Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic-book store, only to fall out over musical differences

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. She is joined by 25-year-old estate agent Hollie-Anna from Margate and 29-year-old Jaison from Norwich, a transsexual man who feels like he has exhausted his local dating pool. They will both choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. But will they prove to be a good match?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj feels upset about not being in a relationship, so Penny sets out to find a date and introduces him to a girl he can actually talk to. They hit it off, but when it becomes apparent he has been buying her expensive gifts, his friends suspect she is only interested in his wealth

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's old adversary Wil Wheaton returns and invites everyone to a house-warming party. Leonard is eager to go, but Sheldon threatens to shun him if he attends. However, he soon changes his mind when he finds out that Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Brent Spiner will also be there

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Something unprecedented happens in the First Dates restaurant tonight. When stunning 25-year-old Sasha is stood up, an unexpected knight in shining armour is waiting in the wings - waiter Sam. Meanwhile, 38-year-old sales manager Scott, who is looking for someone to mend his broken heart after the failure of an eight-year relationship, meets 28-year-old PA Victoria, and 55-year-old receptionist Debbie has her first date with a woman, in the shape of 59-year-old divorced security guard Ann

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, turning their attention to shows including Britain's Got Talent, The Shallows, Antiques Roadshow, Line of Duty, Miriam's Dead Good Adventure and University Challenge. Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in April 2019

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies dishes out the absurd A-list challenges once more. Aisling Bea, Bob Mortimer, Mark Watson, Nish Kumar and Sally Phillips are driven to ever more absurd lengths in the battle to lay their sticky fingers on Taskmaster Greg's golden head

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The lads visit a Caravan Club meeting under the impression that it is really a massive orgy, but are embarrassed when Jay's dad decides to give them advice on sex - whether they like it or not. Sitcom about four teenagers growing up in suburbia, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will is put in charge of organising the end-of-term Christmas prom, and tempts fate by enlisting the help of Simon, Jay and Neil. Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: The family is divided over the idea of getting a dog after Dre and Rainbow promise Jack he can have one if he achieves straight As at school. Rainbow's brother Johan is back in town but he doesn't get the warm welcome he was expecting from Ruby

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: After arguing more than usual, Dre and Rainbow decide to consult their therapist, who suggests they make time for a date night. Following DeVante's first birthday party, the inflatable bouncy house is left behind, so Jack and Diane make the most of it in different ways

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's attempts to flirt with a student who goes to Riley's new British boyfriend's college go awry, causing Philip to potentially face losing both his job and his visa. Meanwhile, Tucker puts on a fake English accent in order to attract women

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: A horrified Ben realises that he once dated Tucker's new girlfriend, and he soon becomes convinced that she only got together with Tucker to get back at him for their terrible break-up. Meanwhile, Riley is excited when she is invited to a spa day with her boss. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard's fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica is jealous of Barry's outstanding performance when they both get after-school jobs at Spencer's Gifts selling novelty presents at the shopping mall. Murray insists that Adam must get a job too, but Beverly thinks he should focus on his filmmaking instead

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam tries to develop an acting career, a talent agent decides he's only suitable for 'nerd' roles, so Beverly makes it her mission to turn him into a teen heartthrob. Barry decides to embrace the punk rock lifestyle, and Murray attempts to get more involved in Erica's life

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldon's and Leonard's dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray help Erica move into her college dormitory, where her room-mate is also named Erica, but Beverly has a hard time saying goodbye to her daughter. Now that Lainey has gone to college, Adam tries to find the perfect girlfriend for Barry, even pretending to build one, as in the film Weird Science

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam has to tackle a school project on the Second World War, so decides to make a film featuring his grandfather. However, Pops takes matters into his own hands when Adam finds all his war stories mundane. Erica fails to cope with her own cooking and laundry at college and returns home to confront Beverly for over-mothering her, but Murray insists that Beverly starts to teach Erica and Barry basic life skills

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago and Diaz investigate Jake's claim that somebody is trying to sabotage his professional life and get him dismissed. Boyle partners up with Hitchcock and Scull to solve a tough case, while Jeffords lies to Gina claiming he and Holt attended her dance troupe's performance. Chris Parnell guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake badly injures himself while chasing down a suspect, but then refuses to take time off from work to recover. Holt and Rosa have an awkward dinner date with their significant others, so they invite Amy and Gina along as well. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The couples go on their final dates before making a decision about whether to renew their vows, and also gain outside perspective and advice through partner swapping in one-on-ones

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Piebald Inn in Hunmanby, North Yorkshire, where the lack of a thermostat and a divisive design idea irritate some of the guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Stoneleigh House Hotel, a boutique townhouse in the heart of Buckingham run by Jane Parslow and Rachel Rawding

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: The Hi Way elephants have been hit with a potentially deadly virus, with the youngest members of the family most at risk, and the keepers and Chester Zoo's veterinary team do all they can to combat the mysterious illness. Meanwhile, Mac the stallion zebra is introduced to the zoo's three mares in the hope they will produce much needed offspring for this endangered species. There's also a look into the bizarre world of the naked mole rat

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge searches for a stash of wine, said to be hidden by the Germans during the Second World War. Fiona starts renovating a dining room for a visit by the mayor. programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: In Killearn, Stirlingshire, Kevin McCloud revisits Jim and Simone Fairfull, who built a light-filled glass pavilion projecting over a private Scottish loch, to see if it has delivered all it promised. The spectacular design took its toll on Jim, whose stress-related illness was exacerbated by the prolonged building work, but he hoped that living in a tranquil setting might cure him of his condition

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George looks back on some of the most radical transformations from across the series, including a 1980s property that was mostly garage, a depressing bungalow with fake-leaded windows and a house where the only access to the garden was through a bedroom

programme.title: Swingers
programme.desc: Documentary about the scene in which people engage in group sex or swap sexual partners, going behind the scenes at one of Britain's most popular swingers' clubs to find out what kinds of people attend and why

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St George's as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Arun's attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug aren't successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George looks back on some of the most radical transformations from across the series, including a 1980s property that was mostly garage, a depressing bungalow with fake-leaded windows and a house where the only access to the garden was through a bedroom

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Angela, 59, has come to St George's as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Arun's attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug aren't successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: Food Unwrapped

Kate Quilton goes in search of the perfect tomato and finds herself in the middle of the world's biggest food fight at a festival in Valencia, and Matt Tebbutt examines why tinned anchovies taste salty when fresh ones don't, visiting a processing plant to find out

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enlists the help of paper-cutting expert Poppy Chancellor to make personalised wedding invitations for a couple about to tie the knot. Plus, the inventive presenter creates a craft collage to celebrate the arrival of a newborn baby

programme.desc: Elsa and Brian Surridge were on the verge of buying a Spanish property when the 2008 financial crisis scared them off. A decade later they're back and Brian has promised Elsa they won't leave without bagging their dream retirement property on the Costa Blanca. Jasmine Harman shows them five very different options for their cash budget of £75,000.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are on the Wirral, where Simon has a plan to turn a chunky chain into a standard lamp and Henry picks up a 1963 Ford Anglia to get it back to its best

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is near Preston, where Simon O'Brien restores a spotlight he believes may be from a German U-boat while Henry Cole gets creative with an aircraft jump seat

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The story of a family divided by agricultural hardship who ended up living on opposite sides of the world, and as the team races to find the heirs to a recently advertised unclaimed estate, a surprise connection is made in Malta

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to Cambridgeshire to meet self-builders Sarah and Rob, who are aiming to construct a family home in the village where they first met as children

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition gets under way at the Oak Tree Cottage in Burley, Hampshire, where owner Jacqui Castle and her sidekick Jane Waters hope the homely approach will win the day. Guests Martin and Catherine Crosswaite are not encouraged by the shared facilities, while breakfast served at a communal table is not to the liking of Norman Butcher and Lorraine Watkins

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Bath's the Rising Sun Inn, where owners Lorraine Hawkins and Norman Butcher hope to bring their guests up to standard by having a dress code. Following their feedback on the last visit, Jacqui and Jane take an extra critical eye to the rooms, while Martin and Catherine show their competitive streak during a boules match

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Busfeild Arms in East Morton for the third day of the contest, where hosts Martin and Catherine Croswaite pride themselves in giving great Yorkshire hospitality. Jacqui is overwhelmed by the luxury and extras in the rooms, which raises questions about how the owners make a profit. Meanwhile, Martin shocks the group by sharing his stunt motorbike riding past, and later, Patrick feels the pressure of being the final host

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stopover is at Patrick Duggan's Beatles-themed Epstein House in Liverpool, the former home of band manager Brian Epstein's father. Jacqui and Jane are unimpressed by unpleasant smells in the bedroom, while Martin and Catherine show they will do anything to win during a game of Fab Four charades. At dinner, Patrick shocks his guests when he reveals his idea of the ideal woman. Will it have an effect on their feedback?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. Jacqui and Jane from the Oak Tree Cottage want to find out why Norman and Lorraine wouldn't return, while Martin and Catherine from the Busfeild Arms have some explaining to do when it comes to their profit margins. Accusations fly around the table as payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel around Britain to find items to fix up and flog on to make a profit for their owners. In this episode, Henry finds a treat for restorer Guy, and Simon creates stunning table lamps from old theatre lights

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Cameras follow Chester Zoo's four new fledgling Humboldt penguins who are being brought up apart from the main colony until they're old enough to compete for fish in the main pool. They're keen to make a break for it and join the adults, but when they're finally free to go they have other ideas. Elsewhere, Niall the chimpanzee keeper has known chimp Boris for 44 years. When the ape captures a moorhen chick, Niall must use his powers of persuasion to negotiate the safe release of his hostage

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: It's crunch time for Jonathan and Michael who are facing their investors, but their newest idea - to keep goats - does not go down well. Philip and Angelina host the big anniversary party they've been spending weeks preparing for, but with broken toilets and 60 guests to contend with, how will it go? Plus, single mother Fiona battles to get her dining room ready to show off to the mayor

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud returns to Sussex to see how Ben Law's woodsman's cottage has changed. The house was built on a low budget, using methods dating back to the early medieval period with raw materials from the surrounding countryside. During the past 18 months the upstairs has been completed and the outside has been landscaped. Kevin also discovers how the property has changed Ben's life since the original programme was broadcast

programme.title: Matt Baker: Our Farm in the Dales
programme.desc: Matt calls in old family friend Richard and his heavy machinery to take on his biggest plan to date - a new road around the farm, hopefully making everything more accessible for his parents. The list of repairs keeps growing and Matt finds himself in a race against the rain to fix a hole in the roof of the new chicken barn, but the family get a welcome break from work when the puppies are born and Molly, Luke and Nicola get to meet the new arrivals for the first time

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits the largest wholesale food market in the world in Paris and discovers why British cheese sales are soaring across Europe. programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton visits the world's largest jelly bean producers to discover what they are made of instead of gelatine, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why maple syrup is so expensive

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: After years spent dedicated to their demanding careers in nursing and social work, Gillian and Paul Clarke from Stockport have decided it's time to start taking it a little easier and put themselves first. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The team is in Hay-on-Wye and Bedford, where Henry restores a bespoke workbench, and Simon ponders the possibilities of some discarded planks of wood

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The probate researchers try to solve the tricky case of a man named Smith. Plus, the story of a man whose troubled childhood led him to become separated from his adoptive family, and details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton visits West Yorkshire, where Emma and Martin are battling wind and snow while building a stone home on an imposing hilltop. They've self-built before and Martin works in the trade, but the sheer scale of the project and an escalating budget leave the couple scrambling to finish before their family face homelessness

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Bell House Hotel in Wiltshire, where business partners Chris Williams and Jacqui Hogg hope guests will appreciate their attempts to bring London chic to the shires. Susan and David Speak are frustrated by the low shower pressure, while Jade Hendon butts heads with Matthew over healthy eating at dinner and the hosts' absence at breakfast the next morning gets the criticism flowing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to the Partridge in Oxfordshire, where young couple Matthew Cockman and Paula Szkwarkowska hope guests will get on board with their passion for local organic food. A communal bathroom has the guests lost for words, and the lack of a hot breakfast included in the price leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouths

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Strawberry Gardens B&B in Heysham for the third day of the contest, where husband and wife team Susan and David Speak offer home-from-home accommodation and an abundance of northern hospitality. Sports enthusiast David treats his guests to a traditional darts competition, adjudicated by former world champion Alan Warriner-Little, but he is unimpressed when Paula sends back her evening meal. However, it is Chris and Jacqui's feedback that disappoints the hosts the most

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Bateman's Mill near Chesterfield, where manager Jade Hendon has high hopes of being the best. But she faces an uphill battle when David and Susan go out of their way to find hairs in the bathroom - and to make mattters worse, her Derbyshire breakfast is not a hit with Chris and Jacqui

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and to settle some scores, starting with Chris and Jacqui, owners of the Bell House, who want to find out why Matthew marked them down for being 'too tall' for his bed. The group members proceed to thrash out their differences before the week's winners are revealed

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo head to Wales to see how can create the most profit on items, including an oil dispenser, fire grate, chaise longue and even a catamaran

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: With numbers in the wild dwindling rapidly, Chester Zoo's black rhino breeding programme is a key part of preserving the species. Black rhino Kitani is introduced to new mate Magadi, but with injury a high risk during mating, keeper Babs is concerned that Kitani may struggle to defend herself, since she lost her horn after the death of her calf. Meanwhile, there's a surprise birth in the orangutan house, and older sibling Tuti has to fend for herself and set out on the road to independence

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Dick Strawbridge follows the fortunes of Brit Mandy and her American business partner Steve, who have decided to build a swimming pool to entice more paying guests to their stunning cliff-edge chateau in the Dordogne. Desperate to increase income at his chateau, Michael invites Angel Adoree to help out with an experiment to do afternoon tea for the locals

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Tim and Zoe Bawtree, who live in a costly Regency property in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, plan to build a modern, low-maintenance house in their back garden. However, height restrictions mean 60 per cent of their new home has to be underground and there are 90 objections from neighbours to their planning application. Undeterred, the pair press ahead, only to encounter further problems - including the departure of the builders

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: A former divorce client seeks the firm's help, claiming a new play running in Chicago is based on his divorce and shares specific details that unearth more than just his dirty laundry. Diane tries to get to the heart of Memo 618. Legal drama, starring Christine Baranski, Delroy Lindo and Audra McDonald

programme.title: The Tudors
programme.desc: An envoy from the Papal States arrives to discuss the annulment of Henry's marriage to Catherine of Aragon. The outcome of the talks will determine Cardinal Wolsey's future and influence the nature of the relationship between England and Rome

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Five-year-old Isa is rushed to A&E after being hit by a car and trapped underneath it, and doctors suspect the impact may have caused serious internal damage, as well as significant head injuries. Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts, with Sean Lock and Stephen Mangan taking on guest captain Richard Ayoade and Katherine Ryan. Bill Bailey is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley is in charge of the letters and numbers

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max races against the clock to rearrange the budget when faced with employees going unpaid, while Kapoor is presented with a device that's the future of medicine. Medical drama, starring Ryan Eggold and Anupam Kher

programme.desc: The Virginia blitz strategy reaches a crucial point, Mike and Frank meet a motorcycle legend ready to clear out his stock, and a VIP pass to a unique man cave turns up a rare item

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef embarks on a series of extended culinary breaks, visiting markets, restaurants, wineries, cafes and bars, looking for food excellence and also some innovative recipes that will encourage viewers to cook at home. He begins his first adventure in autumnal Bordeaux, where he helps judge a local wine contest and hires a 2CV for an excursion to the coast - abundant with mussels and oysters. At home, he cooks a memorable dish of steak frites with Bordelaise sauce

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to Berlin, where history and the avant garde dwell side by side. A city that once made history with its divisive wall and Checkpoint Charlie now teems with an overwhelming array of innovative chefs offering delicious seasonal creations, such as pureed sunflower seeds, Jerusalem artichoke flans and crushed frozen pine nuts. Loved by the likes of Greta Garbo, Charlie Chaplin and Auguste Escoffier there's still a cornucopia of choice for those with a more traditional temperament with eisbein, meatballs and sausages topping every menu in the German capital

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A floating bridge in Seattle, one of the longest such structures in the world, intended to connect the growing suburb of Bellevue with the high-tech downtown heart of the city. Plus, Albert Zwueste is on the Dutch Caribbean island of Curacao exploring one of the world's oldest surviving floating bridges, which helped inspire and inform the Seattle project

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: Maritime engineering in recent years has seen ever bigger ships and sea-based platforms constructed. On occasion, they may need moving, which is the purpose of the Boka Vanguard, the planet's largest heavy lift ship, capable of sinking itself, floating under its cargo and then lifting it up to be moved anywhere on the planet with sea. This extraordinary work of engineering is capable of carrying the Eiffel Tower and the Statue of Liberty at the same time

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: Part one of two. A re-examination of Jack the Ripper's crimes, revealing how the story known today was shaped by the sensationalist press of 1888. This documentary strips back decades of rumour and misinformation to reveal the true lives of the five women slain

programme.title: The Day When
programme.desc: Charles De Gaulle's refusal to surrender to the German invasion of France in 1940, and his subsequent escape to London and establishment of a French government in exile

programme.title: The Day When
programme.desc: Pivotal moments in history recreated using archive materials and dramatic reconstructions, beginning with Churchill persuading the British government to go to war

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: In Dorset, Michael Portillo visits Brownsea Island, where Robert Baden Powell began the scout movement in the early 20th century. Joining a group of present scouts, the presenter learns to build a bivouac and finds out what it is about scouting that still appeals to boys - and girls - today. In the New Forest, Michael searches out some unsung heroes of the First World War - the ponies who became war horses - and hears their story from a commoner who runs a stable and riding school. Then in Bournemouth, the one-time MP investigates a very British institution - the beach hut

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the first leg of a journey from the coalfields of South Wales to the southernmost tip of Cornwall, travelling from Whitland, Carmarthenshire, to Swansea

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Tewkesbury Abbey, Gloucestershire. A visitor from Australia hopes a set of silver knives will be worth the cost of her plane ticket, while two sisters who split their great great grandmother's jewellery between them hope to find out who has the most valuable inheritance. Lennox Cato values a box that may have belonged to William Shakespeare's wife, and a collection of rare figures and dolls turns out to be a find of national importance

programme.title: The Architecture The Railways Built
programme.desc: Tim explores the last working roundhouse in the UK - Barrow Hill in Derbyshire. Tim also visits Bath, a city renowned for its Georgian architecture

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A seemingly endless concrete line stretching through the French countryside, which sits as a monument to a discarded engineering advancement

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A little-known dark past explains the vast monolithic structures that dominate the small British island of Guernsey

programme.title: World War Two From Above
programme.desc: Battlefield historians and military experts re-examine some of the Second World War's most iconic sites, beginning with the fate of the island of Malta. Using drones, experts explore the defences of Malta to understand how the island survived

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: Documentary explaining how a squadron of low-flying bombers freed resistance fighters from Amiens Jail during the Second World War

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents the show from Tewkesbury Abbey, Gloucestershire. programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big
programme.desc: Richard joins the crew of one of the biggest moving objects on earth, the Marie Maersk container ship, on her continuous 28,000-mile voyage from Asia to Europe

programme.title: American Chopper
programme.desc: Part two of two. OCC and PJD rush to finish their Cadillac bikes for the build-off, and Paul Jr faces his father when they unveil their creations at GM

programme.title: Supercar Superbuild
programme.desc: Bentley's plans to develop and build a worthy successor to its Continental GT V8, a much-respected coupe that served its manufacturer well

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: The work that went into completing the Norwegian Breakaway cruise ship before her maiden voyage across the Atlantic

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The processes involved in manufacturing rope, billiard tables and sailboards, and how advances in technology have led to improved production methods

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: The manufacturing processes involved in creating seatbelts, hot-air balloons, windows and wax figurines, and how these methods have adapted to modern technology

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at Starshinezzz in County Durham, where laid-back host Dave Taylor hopes his renowned hospitality will make him a winner

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Summer nears to an end as in Valencia, a couple try pushing their bike business to the next level. Elsewhere, the expat owners of a B&B end their season busier than ever, and two former teachers take on their biggest booking yet

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Recently retired Baksho wants to buy a holiday home in the resort of Gran Alacant on Spain's popular Costa Blanca. With a budget of £100,000 and her sister Sukvinder by her side to help, Jasmine Harman sets out to find Baksho the perfect family friendly property

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Rob and Jan Porter search for a property in Sarasota Bay on Florida's Gulf Coast. The couple have a £120,000 budget for a two-bedroom holiday home where they can escape the rainy winters of north-west England

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Entrepreneur and sports fishing enthusiast Ian Walls from Edinburgh has decided to expand his property portfolio by purchasing a place on Grand Bahama where he can spend a couple of months every winter. With his US-based girlfriend Lisa on hand to offer a second opinion, Sara Damergi shows them a selection of homes for sale around his £111,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Five people from Swindon take turns trying to throw the perfect dinner party. International DJ Mark Eteson hosts the first night and hopes his Ibiza-style menu featuring Bora Bora Beach brownies, paella and fishcakes will be a hit, before challenging his guests to a rave-off which he will judge himself

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Amateur dramatics enthusiast Michaela Kearns hosts the second party in Swindon, but admits she is not much of a cook. She hopes to dazzle her guests with a glamour-filled evening featuring melted chocolate with dipping treats, but anticipates she might not be able to persuade her fellow diners to take part in her planned show tune performance - complete with a full band

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Financial advisor Scott Hillier hosts Swindon's third party, hoping to impress his guests with a Wild West-themed evening. Tensions run high as Gill Bright awkwardly apologises to last night's host Michaela Kearns and Scott Hillier hopes to smooth things over by performing a rap

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Direct sales manager Sally Rachael hosts the fourth dinner party in Swindon, featuring a 'girls' night in' theme with mysteriously titled dishes and a quirky dress code that leaves her guests clueless and unhappy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Alternative therapist Gill Bright hosts the final dinner party in Swindon and has plans for an 'upstairs downstairs' Edwardian-themed evening with sophisticated food followed by some circle dancing to Bob Marley

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staff's attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Postal workers Linda and Andy from Leicestershire are hanging up their mailbags to relocate to the sun-kissed coast of western Cyprus. Jonnie Irwin has five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, but will any have the couple ready to put in an offer?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kelly from Essex would love a holiday home in the Black Sea coastal resort of Sunny Beach in Bulgaria. She's looking for an apartment on a complex, with plenty of facilities and a pool. With a budget of £25,000 and Kelly's best friend Angie coming along to help, will any of Scarlette Douglas's five fantastic properties turn out to be the perfect package?

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a Yorkshire couple who plan to transform a goods wagon into a summerhouse and gin bar, and visits a narrowboat conversion in Buckinghamshire. George's Spanish tour reaches Madrid, where he meets a man who has spent the past 50 years building a cathedral by hand. Plus, work continues on the expandable caravan pod

programme.title: The Queen's Lost Family
programme.desc: Prince George makes a love match and marries the glamorous Princess Marina of Greece and Denmark, while Henry gives up the married Beryl Markham and also makes a suitable marriage. Edward, meanwhile, brings married American divorcee Wallis Simpson to George and Marina's pre-wedding party at Buckingham Palace, scandalising his parents. Not long after George V's Silver Jubilee celebrations, a unifying event for the nation, the King dies and Edward inherits the throne

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: DCI Adam Gallop believes a man declared missing in 2015 has been murdered - but has so far been unable to locate his body, and the more time passes, the less chance there is of new witnesses or forensic evidence turning up. The police investigation takes officers from an urgent excavation in the woods where the missing man is believeds to have been shot to a journey across Europe in search of clues

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, as cameras capture their instant reactions prompted by the week's biggest and best shows, be they entertainment juggernauts, hard-hitting documentaries, news reports or gritty dramas

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. Under the watchful eye of judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrity bakers attempt decorative choux buns in the signature and tackle financiers in the technical before making a showstopping cake that represents something from their bucket list

programme.title: Snackmasters
programme.desc: Fred Sirieix challenges two leading chefs to tackle KFC's Zinger Burger and replicate their original top-secret chicken recipe. Tom Aikens from Muse in Belgravia and Alex Bond from Nottingham's Alchemilla have just seven days to perfect their recipes, before cooking them head to head for KFC's big bosses, who will choose a winner. As the chefs take different but equally outlandish approaches in their quests for a perfect replica, comedian Jayde Adams goes behind the scenes of KFC's factories to reveal how the famous products are really made

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Six-foot gym owner and ex-military man Richard is paired with Emilia. Despite his muscular appearance, he is a sensitive soul who loves musicals and Harry Potter, and his Asperger's leaves him unable to read what others are thinking, so mid-date he is forced to ask Emilia how he is doing. Meanwhile, 40-year-old hotelier Andy arrives at Vesuvius for his first ever date with a man, 37-year-old bouncer Joseph, and police officer Angie hooks up with car salesman Tom, who is determined to leave his stereotypical lad image behind

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Harry and Briony Anscombe, who have decided to move from London to Cornwall with their three young children and begin building work on an ambitious house, inspired by American modernist properties. With a budget of just £400,000, Harry opts to project manage himself, paying local builders by the hour, but his lack of experience in construction proves to be problematic

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team hits the road to sample some of the UK's finest dishes. Andi Oliver samples some Pimm's, and Jimmy Doherty examines the growing popularity of Caribbean jerk seasoning, and the qualities of different cooking apples. Kate Quilton meets a porridge-making champion, and Matt Tebbutt heads to the island of Orkney to discover the perfect vinegar for fish and chips

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests are charmed by Barney Smith's Hobbit-style accommodation at the Hideaway at Baxby Manor in North Yorkshire - although the loos are not quite what they expected

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A mother-and-daughter team dream of running a home furnishings shop on the Costa Blanca. Plus, a couple swap Harlow, Essex, for a future in the French countryside as holiday homeowners, and a yoga teacher from Somerset tests out a Spanish villa, where she hopes to run her wellness retreats

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Hannah, with the help of her friend Helen, is looking for a modern, two-bed apartment with a sea view on the stunning south-west coast of Majorca. But with properties in high demand, can Jasmine Harman find Hannah her dream home for her budget of £250,000?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps Steven Weald and Sue Upson search for a winter home north of Naples on Florida's Gulf Coast, and shows the active couple five properties that are within their £150,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Having both retired from the Army, Rachel and Steven Grey are hoping to find the perfect property on Costa Rica's Pacific Costa Ballena where they can run a small B&B. Sara Damergi shows them a variety of possible options for their £250,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Personal trainer Eve Booth hosts the first dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside, expressing concern that her starter of haggis and black pudding may not be to everyone's taste. Although her main course gets a lukewarm reception, the biggest threat to the evening seems to be fellow contestant Ken Brown's taste in jokes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Interior designer and gypsy wedding supplier Paula Thompson hosts the second party in Co Durham and Wearside, and hopes to bring a touch of class to the proceedings with her 'black and bling' themed event. The evening's menu includes fresh lobster and hairy prawns, accompanied by a spot of belly dancing

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old languages student Donal Anand-Shaw hosts the third dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside, and decides to make the event black tie. He also arranges for a string quartet to play, and serves up a locally-sourced scallop starter

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Debt collector Eleri Watson hosts the fourth dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside. However, her efforts to organise an all-Welsh evening do not go according to plan when soil is found in the leek soup and lamb is served burned, dampening the guests' enthusiasm

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Businessman Ken Brown hosts the final dinner party in Co Durham and Wearside, and hopes to entertain his guests with a 'wear a wig' themed evening. After annoying his fellow contestants over the past week, he hopes to make amends with his unique entertainment, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling business's fortunes. He faces a struggle because parent Adelle has a bad relationship with her staff and is disappointed by the resident chef, leaving Gordon with the added challenge of changing her attitude

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps a couple from the Wirral who are approaching retirement to find a holiday home in Tenerife's Costa Adeje on a budget of £150,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin meets holistic therapist Daniela from East Yorkshire, who is looking to find a property on the coastline of western Madeira to live with her two rescue dogs. She wants a property with sea views, lots of outside space and the potential for a therapy room. With Daniela's budget of £100,000 and her mother Janet by her side to help, Jonnie Irwin lines up five options for her to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin helps husband and wife George and Lennox Thomas find their ideal holiday home in and around the Spanish area of Marina Almeria to escape their busy London lives

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. programme.title: Grand Designs

With a budget of just £400,000, Harry opts to project manage himself, paying local builders by the hour, but his lack of experience in construction proves to be problematic

programme.title: BlacKkKlansman (2018)
programme.desc: During the 1970s, Ron Stallworth, the first African-American police officer to serve in the Colorado Springs Police Department, attempts to infiltrate the local Ku Klux Klan branch with the assistance of Jewish cop Flip Zimmerman. Spike Lee's Bafta and Oscar-winning drama based on a true story, starring John David Washington and Adam Driver

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Barmaid Hattie has heard all the worst chat-up lines but has never had a real relationship. Will things turn around when she is paired with gentle giant Lawrence, a self-professed mummy's boy whose energy is the perfect match for hers? After being single for 24 years, retired dock worker Albert hopes thrill-seeking great-grandmother Carol will be impressed by his yacht, and airline flight dispatcher Ollie thinks he has found the perfect match in cancer nurse Debs when it turns out they are both love knitting and baking

programme.title: First Dates Hotel
programme.desc: Six-foot gym owner and ex-military man Richard is paired with Emilia. Despite his muscular appearance, he is a sensitive soul who loves musicals and Harry Potter, and his Asperger's leaves him unable to read what others are thinking, so mid-date he is forced to ask Emilia how he is doing. Meanwhile, 40-year-old hotelier Andy arrives at Vesuvius for his first ever date with a man, 37-year-old bouncer Joseph, and police officer Angie hooks up with car salesman Tom, who is determined to leave his stereotypical lad image behind

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: An 11-year-old is thrilled to meet his dream dog - Gizmo the pug. However, Wood Green staff are worried his excitement might send breathless Gizmo into a panic. After the loss of her previous dog, Charley is wondering if she can love again and considers whether young lurcher Sonia can fill the void. Plus, ever-optimistic Jack Russell Rocco is matched with the adventurous Job family, who are looking a dog who can keep up with them

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A French bulldog called Dave has a spinal deformity, and Noel discovers that not only does he have a genetic malformation of his sacral and lumbar vertebrae, but also excess bone in the pathways where the nerves travel to his legs. Meanwhile, a six-year-old terrier has lost a paw after being attacked by another dog, and the only options appear to be replacing the paw with a bionic implant or amputating the entire limb

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Hideout Hotel in Hull, run by Jodie Richardson and Enya Donohoe, is the final destination of the week. The hands-off check-in and self-catered apartments prove popular with some guests, but Barney kicks up a stink in the bathroom. During the DIY breakfast, Jodie's handling of a smoky situation sets alarm bells ringing for Carly and Lydia, and feedback leaves the hosts fired up with payment day looming

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A yoga teacher discovers her rented Spanish villa cannot be used to run her retreats, and on the Costa Blanca there are problems for the new owners of a home furnishings shop

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Postal workers Linda and Andy from Leicestershire are hanging up their mailbags to relocate to the sun-kissed coast of western Cyprus. Jonnie Irwin has five options lined up for their £120,000 budget, but will any have the couple ready to put in an offer?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: David and Christina Hurst are looking for a holiday home where they can eventually spend several months a year, and Jonnie Irwin shows them how far their £150,000 budget will stretch in Orlando, Florida

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Mike Bodnar and Liz Prendergast live on a houseboat in France for most of the year, but would like somewhere warmer for the winter months. They know the sun always shines in Tenerife, but are also drawn to Mike's native Liverpool as they have friends there and Liz could get work. Jasmine Harman and Sara Damergi help them make up their minds

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Charity manager Andrew Batsford hosts the first of a week of parties from Hastings, aiming to inspire his fellow contestants with a menu of dishes prepared using foraged ingredients, including sea broccoli and stinging nettles. However, if the food fails to win them over, he hopes a dynamic Wham!-themed evening of festivities will do the trick

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second day of the competition in Hastings, East Sussex, and retired solicitor Adrian Carter is hoping to impress his guests with a Moroccan-themed evening. However, disaster strikes when he neglects his tagine, and his rendition of a Rod Stewart classic does not go down well either

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sally-Anne Keller hosts a German-themed dinner party on the third night in Hastings, East Sussex, and requires her guests to dress, sing and dance accordingly. Charity manager Andrew Batsford explains how the principles of anarchism and punk can be applied to football, while retired solicitor Adrian Carter dresses as the 19th-century statesman Otto von Bismarck and raises eyebrows with his jokes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hairdresser Kate Eadon hosts the fourth dinner party in Hastings, East Sussex, with a menu styled on a gourmet pub meal. Adrian Carter gets himself in hot water, Sally-Anne Keller reveals a surprise celebrity crush, and the host recounts her own encounter with a famous funnyman

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The confident Stelios Michael hosts the final night in Hastings, East Sussex, hoping to impress his guests with a Greek-inspired evening. The diners get involved when they receive a masterclass in the country's traditional dance, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay gives his advice to Paul Bazzini, an award-winning chef from New York who now owns a restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Paul confesses he has lost his passion for food and is struggling to keep up with the business, a situation that seems evident to other members of staff, his wife and customers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Maggie and Alistair from Edinburgh dream of buying a holiday home on the southern coast of Gran Canari, famous for its famous white sandy beaches. Jasmine Harman shows Maggie and Alistair five potential properties, but will any of them prove to be their dream holiday home?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Ben Hillman shows a range of properties in the south of Spain's Costa Blanca to Jacqui, who is on a mission to find her dream holiday home to share with her husband Adrian

programme.title: Grease (1978)
programme.desc: Rebellious American teenager Danny falls for innocent Australian girl Sandy during the summer holidays, but when he later finds out she is a new student at his school, he risks losing her love by trying to act cool in front of his friends. Romantic musical set in the 1950s, starring John Travolta, Olivia Newton-John, Stockard Channing, Jeff Conaway, Didi Conn and Sid Caesar

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Matt Lucas welcomes TV presenter Anneka Rice, comedian John Bishop, pop star Nadine Coyle and wheelchair basketball player-turned-presenter Ade Adepitan into the tent. programme.title: First Dates Hotel
