Will things turn around when she is paired with gentle giant Lawrence, a self-professed mummy's boy whose energy is the perfect match for hers? After being single for 24 years, retired dock worker Albert hopes thrill-seeking great-grandmother Carol will be impressed by his yacht, and airline flight dispatcher Ollie thinks he has found the perfect match in cancer nurse Debs when it turns out they are both love knitting and baking

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Sarah Kendall has set the early pace in the series, but fellow contestants Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack and Mike Wozniak still have plenty of time to win points and emerge victorious. Here, Charlotte climbs a ladder with some toilet roll, Mike tries out a new catchphrase and Lee terrifies an innocent member of the public. Alex Horne helps coax the contestants as they attempt to complete Greg Davies' tasks

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Members of the Fullagar family get more than they bargained for when they are introduced to father and daughter, Pepe and Tink - who can't be separated. Meanwhile, Louise and Angela are conflicted when Trinity a five-month-old lurcher puppy shows off both her adorable side and an impressive ability to chew everything from furniture to shoes

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are house-hunting in the East Midlands with two couples at different stages in life. Lloyd and Karina are buying their first home together. They prefer the rural feel of the villages around Northampton but want to be close to Lloyd's parents - while also being near transport links for London. Helen and Richard fell in love late in life. They are desperate to get out of rented accommodation - but as Kirstie soon realises, it's all about the kitchen for former chef Richard

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect meets a Yorkshire couple who plan to transform a goods wagon into a summerhouse and gin bar, and visits a narrowboat conversion in Buckinghamshire. George's Spanish tour reaches Madrid, where he meets a man who has spent the past 50 years building a cathedral by hand. Plus, work continues on the expandable caravan pod

programme.title: Scotland's Scenic Railways
programme.desc: A historic section of the East Fife coastal railway is prepared for reopening in a celebration of the golden age of steam. However, the presence of beavers living beneath the line threatens to cause disastrous flooding. Trainee conductor Melanie attempts to join the ranks of Scotland's train crew, and the piper and dancers of the Atholl Highlanders perform a tartan takeover at King's Cross station

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old medical student Sepii comes from a wealthy family, and has a huge collection of expensive designer shoes. But now she faces a reality check when she spends time with the Hussains, a family from Manchester who are living on the breadline

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Richard and Brennan are in the Rhondda Valley in South Wales, taking on a unique case as they come to aid of Tina, a 73-year-old widow

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The efforts of north London landlord Franc to evict a tenant withholding rent payments on a property whose boiler mysteriously stopped working whenever the rent was due, and a tenant with asthma who has been forced to sleep on his sofa for two years in a damp flat. Plus, a landlord owed £7,000 in rent discovers her nightmare is not over when she evicts the tenant and gains access to her property

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Stavros and Emily try to get their house back from squatters, while Margaret attempts to recover the £20,000 she is owed from a letting agent, and Peterborough council find 12 people crammed into a category-one fire hazard house. Documentary series in which cameras follow the victims and villains of the buy-to-let boom

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, agents Matt and Garry chase £1,700 owed by an accountant to a client, and officers Max and Paul try to recover almost £30,000 in north west London owed in rent arrears by a dentist after he was barred from working. Meanwhile, agents Max and Steve head to south west London to chase almost £2,000 owed by a cafe owner

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Duncan and the firearms team find themselves in a tense stand-off with suspected drug dealers who could be armed, with German shepherd Tia sent in to search and discovering more than the unit bargained for. Steve has to deal with two teens, one who has crashed a stolen car, and the other who has been involved in a bar brawl, while Kev is poised to take out a car with a stinger

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers go in pursuit of a driver who is so drunk that he can't even keep his car on the road and the chase ends with shocking results. Elsewhere, dog handler Tony encounters a naked man stranded at the side of the road, and Sophie is forced to buy a treat for the entire team due to a rookie mistake

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers track down a high-powered Audi speeding through the back streets of Bradford, which comes to a sudden halt as it crashes into a parked car. In Wakefield, dog handler Duncan and police dog Tia are in hot pursuit of a renegade van, while officers Nick and Bobo rush to a scene of total carnage after a drunk driver has crashed into a house

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Stewart and Iain head to Manchester to recover one of the largest debts they have ever chased - more than £400,000 - owed to a builder after he was failed to receive payment for his work on a house. Meanwhile, officers Gary and Cona are in Kent to chase over £11,000 owed by a couple for unpaid rent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve head to London to recover more than £21,000 in unpaid court costs after a car accident. Officers Aron and Cona team up to recover almost £7,000 owed after a debtor failed to repay a loan to her ex-partners

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Nicolette turns down Chloe's offer, causing embarrassment. Aaron blames David for Fay's death, and Brent tries to make Harlow happy following her bereavement

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: When Dean learns what happened to Bella, he decides not to tell Amber. Roo offers her support to a delusional Martha, and Irene decides to reveal what is going on

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: In the Pembrokeshire town of Tenby, Welsh and English rugby fans seem more focused on kick-off time than parking, threatening to turn its roads into a ruck of cars. Meanwhile in Cardiff, a city with the dubious title of Britain's third-worst place to park, two carloads of parking desperadoes search for a space on match day. In Ivybridge, Devon, locals claim a ticket machine with a typo problem has resulted in an avalanche of unjust tickets and are determined to take their fight to the top

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Police officers monitor events as thousands of protesters wearing V for Vendetta masks march to the Houses of Parliament

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Hull Royal Infirmary staff have to deal with abusive patients disrupting care due to Covid restrictions preventing family members from entering the waiting room. After her motorcycle collided with a deer at 60mph, 56-year-old Tracy is rushed in, and consultant Dr Andy must establish why she is having trouble feeling her legs, while Adam is devastated when an accident in the gym means he may not be able to compete in Hull's strongest man contest

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man is rushed in with multiple stab wounds to his abdomen and after the team check whether his organs have been affected, he is rushed in for emergency surgery. Meanwhile, a teenage footballer arrives by helicopter, having lost all sensation below the waist after an accident during a game, and a dairy farmer is wheeled into A&E, having being knocked unconscious by a cow's hoof. Worried about a bleed on the brain, staff fast-track him to CT, aware that any trauma to the brain could affect his ability to do his very physical job

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Three survivors of the original Woodsboro massacre reunite when a killer dons the infamous ghost mask and strikes during the production of a movie based on their experiences. As they try to determine the identity of the murderer, Sidney discovers a troubling link to her past, forcing her to confront her demons once and for all. Horror sequel, starring Neve Campbell, David Arquette and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: A young, self-made businessman spends time living with a single mother and her three children, who survive on her disability benefits

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Landlord Nicholas Parrington discovers a couple are subletting his house, just months after a previous tenant had turned the property into a brothel, while investors in a community centre for children are aghast when squatters move into their building. In Lewisham, the council's Rogue Landlord Unit raids one of their main streets, on the lookout for slum conditions, illegal overcrowding and criminal activities

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A landlord tries to recover £30,000 in unpaid rent through the courts

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic become party to a fractured family's school fee woes in Staffordshire and Del and Dael need to reclaim £3,500 after a rental van was returned badly damaged. Stewart and Elmor are in Warwickshire, where the members of a household blame their predicament on a scheming landlord whose subsequent arrival sparks a fierce reaction, while Iain helps Stewart remove a young mother from her Lancashire home

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Charlie and Paul are in pursuit of a dangerous driver who failed to stop and sped off down the busy M1 motorway. It takes a stinger operation to stop the suspect, but the interceptors are in for a surprise when they see who is behind the wheel. Meanwhile, officers search for a stolen car, and a man is caught driving under the influence with his child in the car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Nick pulls over an uninsured driver who refuses to give his details, Steve tackles a drink-driver who has blown out two tyres and Nick and Bob chase down a suspicious looking van with false registration plates. Sophie and Adie hunt for a man linked to multiple sexual assault charges and a reckless Audi driver is chased through Wakefield city centre

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit. Nick and the team perform a textbook tactical pursuit and containment on a suspected cloned car, and a drunk driver in Bradford attempts to escape the police. Meanwhile, officers look into the case of a hit-and-run in west Yorkshire

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An evasive man in west London is given a choice between paying up or relinquishing his luxury car, there's a writ for the organiser of a music festival, an aggressive rent defaulter needs evicting, and an entire hole family is angered in Hertfordshire when the agents call to collect a loan owed to a woman's ex-partner

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent wants to learn how to control his mood, and Nicolette wonders if there is a connection to when they arrived. Roxy posts flyers to find her attacker

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Amber wants to leave, but realises the toll it would take on Jai. Leah and Justin make an offer on a house, Martha is hospitalised, and Jasmine hides her wedding ring from Lewis

programme.title: Supermarket Deals: Are They Worth it?
programme.desc: In the wake of the Covid-19 pandemic, supermarkets are fighting harder than ever to get shopper through their doors, bombarding customers with claims that they offer the best value for money. In this programme, Michelle Ackerley investigates whether supermarket's deals are truly beneficial for their customers, and highlights the types of adverts that consumers simply should not trust

programme.title: Hoarders: Stockpile Avalanche
programme.desc: Observational documentary taking a look at a selection of people whose homes are extremely cluttered due to hoarding. Those featured include Sally from the Midlands, whose flat has already been cleared by the local council once before. In north London, 40-year-old Faye has become overwhelmed by her compulsive shopping. Unable to say no to a bargain, she has filled her flat to capacity, even though this includes keeping hold of piles of food that went out of date seven years ago

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Richard and Brennan are called out to a cluttered house in York - and discover that underneath the piles of un-needed item is an unseen layer of dirt left by the owners' three cats

programme.title: 22 Kids & Counting
programme.desc: The Radford children return to education after months off due to the pandemic, and with 11-year-old Max starting at a new high school his parents anxiously wait to see how his first day went. Noel adopts a radical approach to device addiction and takes the older kids on an adventure, while Sue gets some much-needed quiet time at home with the little ones

programme.title: Student Sex Workers
programme.desc: Two-part series following students working within the sex industry, as they attempt to pay off their student debt by stripping, escorting and filming pornography. In the first episode, paramedic science student Jasmine opens up about her experience in the adult industry, which she fears may get her thrown off her university course. Elsewhere, PHD student Luke looks back at the time he appeared in an adult movie as an undergraduate student

programme.title: First Time Call Girl
programme.desc: Women from the world of escorting discuss what really happens behind closed doors, following 22-year-old Alexis as she journeys into the sex industry and explores the reasons behind her choices. The programme also follows Kat, who is considering leaving her escorting career behind, and 28-year-old Cassandra, a high end call girl who charges £3,000 per day

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: A driver is trapped in his car after it careered out of control, smashing into a wall before flipping sideways onto a driveway. Dr Polly Haywood and critical care paramedic Sarah Folley are sent to the scene

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Dr Julian Humphrey and Sister Benita Wainwright treat Phil, who has the rare condition aortic dissection, while Dr Humphrey also tries to put a man's dislocated shoulder into place. Consultant Dr Bharath Reddy and junior Dr George Kay are on standby to treat 14-month-old Heaven, who is rushed in with breathing problems, while volunteer Jane keeps the team and patients fed and watered

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Brent wants to learn how to control his mood, and Nicolette wonders if there is a connection to when they arrived. Roxy posts flyers to find her attacker

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Cleaning duo Jon and Brennan take on some of Britain's filthiest and most cluttered homes. In three days, the pair bring the grubbiest homes back to life

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A man has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired secretary has to visit her tenant in prison to retake possession of her buy-to-let flat. A Manchester mother applies to the housing charity Shelter for help because she is convinced the property she is renting is making her children ill

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit. Officers pursue an off-road motorbike, which results in the riders trying to escape over a garden fence. Elsewhere, Garry and Stef catch one of Leeds' most prolific burglars, and officers find suspicious-looking paraphernalia in another driver's vehicle

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers chase a car trying to escape the wrong way down the M62, a pursuit which ends in three arrests and the seizure of a van full of potentially stolen generators. Elsewhere in West Yorkshire, the Proactive Intercept Team seize more than £200,000 of unlawfully obtained cash, and in Bradford, officers Nicky and Claire are on hand to get an unsafe Golf off the roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Police officers race through the streets of Leeds on an extraordinary pursuit. Elsewhere in Huddersfield, Duncan and dog Tia join forces with the firearms unit, combining their expertise to bring two wanted men to justice. Later, Adie and Chris spend an evening lost in a forest after hunting down a wanted vehicle

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. The duo also face an angry defendant in Swindon when trying to collect £2,000 for unpaid rent on a lock-up, while in Buckinghamshire, Matt and Garry consider seizing a haul of luxury watches to pay more than £16,000 owed to a landlord

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor set out to evict a tenant from a property in Manchester but when the man claims he knew nothing about the court order tempers begin to fray. A car salesman in Cumbria is not happy about paying £4,500 to a dissatisfied customer, and in Shropshire a pub licensee claims she is unable to pay the rent she owes to her ex-landlord. With emotions running high, can she cut a new deal?

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Yashvi is relieved to find Dipi and Shane in a good place. Olivia's constant begging causes Karl to boil over, and he creates some serious problems

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin, Tori and Christian discuss the house purchase as well as a wedding date, when a disappointing message arrives from the bank. Lewis suspects Christian is guilty

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in Blackpool
programme.desc: Documentary following Britons living the high life on a low budget in Blackpool, one of the country's favourite resorts, from holiday-makers to those who have made the Lancashire town their home. Entertainer Simon Green - aka Betty Legs Diamond - talks about his life as a drag queen, and Scottish sisters Agnes and Margaret get more than they bargained for as part of their holiday package. Meanwhile, Jamie Diggins, who works as an estate agent for caravans, takes delivery of a static home that costs an amazing £280,000

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: A 74-year-old with breathing difficulties is rushed into Barnsley Hospital, and registrar Dr Nick Mani considers placing the patient in a medically-induced coma to stabilise him. Junior doctor Ashleigh Trimble assesses 70-year-old Dave, whose daughter Sarah fears her dad's confusion and loss of appetite are masking a more serious condition

programme.title: 999: Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man is rushed in with horrific head and neck wounds after being attacked with a machete, and as the medics fight to stabilise him, his blood pressure drops and they need to take urgent action. The doctors also treat a motorbike racer who was injured during his last event before retirement, and a 17-year-old who fell on his head from a substantial height

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Medical staff are faced with an aggressive patient who was brought in by police after being pushed down a flight of concrete stairs, and is shouting and swearing. Doctors are concerned that his behaviour could be as a result of a serious head injury. Doctor Andrew administers morphine to help a woman in agony, but the medics grow worried when her screams turn to silence

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Documentary following emergency response teams on their most extreme medical callouts

programme.title: Skin A&E
programme.desc: The specialist clinic opens its doors to patients with acne, psoriasis and cysts.

programme.title: Plastic Surgery Knifemares
programme.desc: The quest of some people to try to entirely change their body, featuring TOWIE star and reality TV favourite Abi Clarke, who talks about the lip fillers that left her in agony

programme.title: The Disappearance
programme.desc: First episode of the drama about the search for a boy who vanishes from his 10th birthday party and the secrets the case exposes among his family

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A widow hires Jason to help represent her when the police decide that she is the most likely suspect in orchestrating her wealthy husband's death

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Petty officer Jody Ray is killed by a hit-and-run driver and evidence points to staff sergeant Justin Dunne, whose guilt seems certain when DiNozzo and McGee find him washing a bloodstained knife when they go to arrest him. However, Dunne tells his lawyer Carrie Clark he was miles away in Falls Church at the time - stabbing bookmaker Donny Sullivan to death. Unable to reveal the truth to the NCIS team, Clark decides to check out the alibi herself. Crime drama, guest starring Salli Richardson-Whitfield (A Town Called Eureka)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An internal security breach forces NCIS to go into lockdown when a covert listening device is found in a pen belonging to Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter. DiNozzo discovers that National Security Agency analyst Ellie Bishop wrote a report two years previously predicting the possibility of such an occurrence and she is brought in to assist with the investigation and track down the culprit. Guest starring Leslie Hope and Emily Wickersham

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sound-system installer is murdered after supplying goods to a strip club covertly operated by the Mafia, and the finger of blame points to a small-time hoodlum whose crime boss father is serving life imprisonment. The case eventually comes to trial - but investigators are disturbed to hear an untrustworthy government attorney is handling the prosecution. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant student is found murdered, and detectives Briscoe and Curtis discover she was strangled to death before being stabbed by the killer in an effort to make the attack seem like the random act of a psychopath. A mathematics professor soon comes under suspicion as eyewitnesses allege he was close to the crime scene on the night in question

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis uncover new evidence as they investigate a 30-year-old rape and stabbing case, but the victim is consumed with fear when confronted with the possibility of another trial for the perpetrator

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an insurance salesman who sold bogus policies to European Jews during the Second World War and soon discover the victim possessed valuable information about specific policy numbers that could provide a link to the culprit. Jerry Reach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives Green and Briscoe search for a gigolo suspected of killing an elderly rich woman and stealing a large amount of her jewellery, but as investigations progress, it becomes clear there is more to the murder than meets the eye. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An attorney is killed shortly after deciding to file a sexual harrassment claim against his employer, and when Briscoe and Curtis investigate further, they discover both the alleged harasser and his wife have excellent motives for murder

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate when marine corporal Flegman is found shot to death, and a phone leads them to a hotel room where Gibbs awkwardly stumbles upon his ex-wife Diane Sterling and her FBI agent ex-husband TC Fornell. She had been attempting to call her boyfriend Eddie to break up with him, but somehow Flegman had taken possession of his phone. The team tracks down Eddie's car and discovers a clown nose along with traces of blood and he quickly becomes the prime suspect

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Eames and Goren's investigation into the murder of a pharmaceutical salesman found cut in half uncovers a web of corruption involving fraud, bribery, identity theft and a conspiracy to sell contaminated blood. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A stockbroker discovers unsettling information about a company trading in land and water rights, and later becomes the prime suspect in the murder of her lover. However, evidence emerges that the crime is part of a scheme to manipulate share prices

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames' investigation into the murder of an undertaker leads them to discover a field of decomposed corpses. The detectives soon turn their attentions to the owner of a nearby crematorium and his shady relationship with a contract killer. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The 10th anniversary of the September 11, 2001, terrorist attacks arrives, prompting the forensic investigators to recall what they were each doing on the day. Meanwhile, Mac is still on leave, and Jo has been placed in charge of the team investigating the murder of a bouncer who was shot when two men robbed the bar he was working at. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team investigate the murder of a college student, focusing their inquiry on his best friend, who has been printing counterfeit money - but evidence suggests another party may have been involved. Meanwhile, Jo feels anxious about meeting her son's new room-mate and Danny deals with additional strain on his marriage

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate when a child goes missing, uncovering several similar cases all linked by sightings of a mysterious ghostly presence. It transpires that the Weeping Woman - or La Llorona - is a ghost who kidnaps three children every Halloween and drowns them, hoping their sacrifice can atone for the loss of her own children, whom she also drowned. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: After experiencing disturbing visions, Nick discovers a fellow Grimm is torturing and murdering monsters that have harmed humans, spreading panic among the Wesen creatures. Renard and Juliette's connection moves to the next level. David Giuntoli stars

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars

Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. A shootout between a motorist and the police leads to the discovery of a body in a car boot - and puts the detectives on the trail of a money-laundering operation run by Russian gangsters. Drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part two of two. As the case continues, Assistant DA Antonella Ricci and eyewitness Billy Woodson's mother are found dead at a supposedly safe location, killed by Colombian drug-dealers working alongside the Russian gangsters. Drama series, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gas attack occurs at a subway station, and investigations reveal it bears the hallmarks of a previous incident at a church. Briscoe and Curtis are joined by Baltimore detectives Bayliss and Pembleton, who hope to apprehend the prime suspect in both incidents

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Sanitation workers find the body of a teenage boy, and the investigation leads to a school bully who displays an enthusiastic interest in martial arts. As the case progresses, the team discovers the youngster's father had bought the murder weapon, and attempts a risky gamble to bring the killer to justice

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A schizophrenic woman is found strangled, leading Green and Briscoe to suspect a homeless man of the murder. Taken into custody, he refuses to take his antidepressant medicine, rendering himself incapable of standing trial for murder. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A hard-partying model, with a cocaine habit goes missing, and when the team investigates, a basketball player, a limo driver and a nightclub owner are suspected of orchestrating her disappearance

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers faulty bulletproof vests in an abandoned truck filled with stolen USMC merchandise, and attempts to locate the source of the cargo and any vests that could have been sent to military personnel overseas. Crime drama, guest starring Challen Cates, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo confronts a man impersonating a Navy officer, which results in guns being drawn, and the only eyewitness to the case is the Special Agent's father - who is in town to disclose a secret to his son. The 250th episode of the crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a marine working for the Defence Intelligence Agency who was blamed for the disappearance of 500 specialised rifles in Afghanistan. A cryptic message found at the scene, written in the victim's blood, leads the agents on the trail of a controversial manuscript that claims to expose the truth about the missing weapons, and an FBI agent with a secret. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: L.A.'s Finest
programme.desc: The Bens investigate the killing of the trans woman, while with Dante back in her life, it is impossible for McKenna to keep hiding the truth about her mother's death from Syd

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A social services worker and a deputy mayor are murdered, and the detectives discover a link to a 10-year-old mathematics prodigy and his obsessive, pushy father. Starring Vincent D'Onofrio, with Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murders of a university president and his assistant present the detectives with a number of suspects, including a controversial academic, a graduate student and an ambitious woman with her eye on the top job. Drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and his team are puzzled when a woman's body is found in a Ferrari, until they discover she was part of a car-theft ring and may have unknowingly stolen a vehicle belonging to one of the world's most wanted criminals. Crime drama, starring Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny gets into an altercation that leads to a brawl when he is out drinking with some of his team-mates. He is knocked unconscious, and comes round to find an undercover officer has shot his assailant dead, claiming the man had a gun. As he begins to doubt his leadership abilities, his career is put at risk when evidence suggests he lied about the facts of the case. Crime drama, starring Carmine Giovinazzo

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Hank reflects on an arrest for murder he made of a man who claimed monsters were involved. With the man's death sentence approaching and the knowledge he has recently acquired from Nick, Hank begins to wonder if the man's absurd claims were true and that he may be innocent of the crime. Meanwhile, Monroe finds himself involved in a situation he never saw coming.

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Adalind returns to avenge her mother's death, and blackmails Renard into helping her. Juliette confesses to Nick that she has feelings for another man

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The DA hires Jason to help convict Hazel Diaz, a drug dealer who murdered a police officer but has avoided jail for years on an insanity defence

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo confronts a man impersonating a Navy officer, which results in guns being drawn, and the only eyewitness to the case is the Special Agent's father - who is in town to disclose a secret to his son. The 250th episode of the crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A bomb detonates at a military charity concert, killing two men. Called to investigate, Tony and McGee try to determine whether the intended target was the 1980s rocker headlining the act or if the attack was part of a larger scheme against the military. Meanwhile, Jimmy prepares for parenthood. Keith Carradine guest stars, with Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a man goes on a shooting spree in Central Park, Briscoe and new partner Green pull out all the stops to trace the weapon. McCoy, meanwhile, sets his sights on finding the killer - and the person who sold him the gun. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach, Jesse E Martin and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a civil court judge. Catching the man they think responsible, they bring him to trial - but the victim refuses to implicate him. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a social worker, exposing a racket involving foster children. The resulting trial sees Paul Robinette place the system in the dock as he defends a black woman accused of kidnapping her baby from his adoptive parents. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A separated couple blame each other for concealing their missing baby, but the discovery of bloodstains in their apartment suggests another, more tragic explanation. An angry Briscoe suspects the father of murder - until the infant's remains are found, raising the possibility that both parents could be responsible

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part one of two. Best-selling mystery writer PK Todd and her accountant are gunned down outside a restaurant. Miraculously, Todd survives but her companion is mortally wounded, prompting Briscoe and Green to launch a murder inquiry and discover the culprit's real target. However, they soon find themselves mixed up in a deadly case of jealousy and betrayal. Guest starring Ruthie Henshall and Tom Berenger

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is shot in her sleep, and further investigation leads the detectives to a boy whose drug-addicted mother has placed him in the care of her dealer. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gibbs joins forces with the FBI when the body of a congressman and former agent washes ashore in New Orleans. Together they try to determine if the murder could be linked to a well-known case the victim had previously worked on during his career. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. DiNozzo, McGee and the FBI continue to track political connections to a case, and Bishop sends DiNozzo a souvenir. Meanwhile, Gibbs and Special Agent Pride chase leads in New Orleans after evidence points to a copycat killer. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Pauley Perrette and Scott Bakula

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee's girlfriend Delilah makes a breakthrough in a case involving the alleged death of a US navy lieutentant. However, when her boss orders her to back away, she turns to the NCIS team for help. Meanwhile, McGee talks to DiNozzo about whether he should move forward with his relationship. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins and Fin immerse themselves in learning a new witness interview technique. Meanwhile, Benson works with the victim of a rape

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An assistant district attorney takes the law into his own hands by gunning down a hired killer following a series of death threats. The finger of suspicion immediately points to his wife, but when cracks appear in the seemingly airtight case, Goren and Eames are led on a different trail. Spin-off drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames examine the murder of a mother-of-two. The investigation leads them to a counterfeiting operation and the home of an actor - who puts them on the trail of an important official document. Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman is stabbed to death in her flat, and suspicion initially falls on her boyfriend Hank, a known drug addict trying to sort his life out after being released from prison on parole. His brother Riley, a high-school basketball prodigy, is furious his sibling has let him down in their joint dream of becoming sports stars, but as evidence emerges, it becomes clear to Sid, Hawkes and the team that while Hank may be troubled, he is not a killer. Crime drama, starring Robert Joy and Hill Harper

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A fraternity house's initiation ritual turns deadly when a student is killed and another disappears. The detectives discover the deceased man was carrying four mobile phones and that he was the mastermind behind the games, leading them to a cemetery and a sinister money-making scheme

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Grimm

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: At an exhibition, the ghost of an artist enlists Melinda's help to obtain a fair price for his work, so his struggling daughter can have the money. However, she first has to resolve a rift between the pair, because his imprisonment ruined their chance to get to know each other

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Part two of two. Having married Uther, Queen Catrina increases her influence over Camelot. Her accusation that Merlin is a thief forces the wizard into hiding, leaving him to seek evidence that she is secretly a troll. If that were not hard enough, he must also identify the spell that will break her hold over the king. Fantasy drama, starring Colin Morgan and Anthony Head, with Sarah Parish and Adam Godley

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Uther invites notorious witch-hunter Aredian to Camelot in a desperate bid to rid the kingdom of magic, and no one is beyond his suspicion. Morgana is certain the ruthless detective will burn her at the stake, so it is up to Merlin to try to save her without landing himself in trouble. Fantasy drama, guest starring Charles Dance, with Anthony Head and Colin Morgan

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Two bodies are found buried under tar at a construction site, one of which is identified as a mail-order bride who went missing. The team tracks down her husband, who had previously been arrested for beating her up and had not reported her disappearance. Meanwhile, Grissom presses Sara to reveal a secret from her past

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: The story of Jerry Amster, who was caught trying to smuggle heroin and ended up facing a lengthy spell in one of Russia's toughest labour camps

programme.title: Nothing to Declare
programme.desc: A Korean woman encounters trouble when frog fat and beef lollies are found in her luggage. Plus, customs officials suspect a businessman's brand named goods are counterfeit

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team travels to the planet Argos, where O'Neill is infected with a rare virus for which there is no known cure, causing him to age rapidly

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay comes up with a plan to harness the energy of a strange planet's misty atmosphere, supplying everyone with an opportunity to make a trip back to Earth - although they fear they may not be able to return to Atlantis. Sci-fi drama, starring David Hewlett

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A combat practice simulation in preparation for a possible Borg attack sees the Enterprise crew divided up, with some officers occupying an 80-year-old Federation ship called the Hathaway. However, as tactics are being determined, matters turn deadly when a Ferengi battle-cruiser appears intent on determining what commodity on board the elderly vessel would be so valuable that the pride of the Federation's fleet would be tasked to destroy it. Patrick Stewart stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The double of Kira's slain love requests asylum on Deep Space Nine, and although she is unimpressed by his ideals, the Bajoran cannot help feeling attracted to him. Sci-fi adventure, starring Nana Visitor

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer, Reed and Major Hayes infiltrate a Xindi-Sloth industrial colony as part of a reconnaissance mission to find out about the weapons of mass destruction that will be used against Earth. Sci-fi drama, starring Scott Bakula and Jolene Blalock

programme.title: Lost Girl
programme.desc: A Light Fae who has been marked for death hopes to reconcile with his brother, so Bo and Dyson take risks to heal the siblings' relationship and investigate the omen

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda tries to make peace with her mother in a bid to lay a ghost to rest, forcing her to remember how her gift drove them apart in the first place

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Andrea's unconscious friend tries to give Melinda clues to the last known location of his missing brother, but to piece together the story the medium has to convince doctors to allow the patient to flatline

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: A challenge to Arthur from a mysterious warrior sets in motion a terrible chain of events, which leads to the uncovering of a dark secret that threatens the whole kingdom, as Merlin and the Prince respond to a request from the beautiful Morgause. Emilia Fox (Silent Witness) guest stars alongside Bradley James and Colin Morgan

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: The wizard rescues a druid girl who has been captured by a bounty hunter, but his heroics lead to the release of a ferocious magical beast that brings terror to Camelot. As Merlin tries to protect the stranger, their friendship develops, but the arrival of her former jailer forces him to make several heart-breaking decisions. Fantasy drama, starring Colin Morgan and Laura Donnelly

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team discovers the tyres of a missing woman's abandoned car have been tampered with, and a man who had made advances toward her in a bar is questioned. programme.desc: The band performs in an underwater base, only to discover that anyone who spends too long down there starts to go mad

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: Kylie suffers a knock on the head while stranded in the jungle which leaves her convinced she is a monkey

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Kong: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Animated fantasy adventures

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar and his crew throws all the food overboard to appease a monster they think is chasing them - but then have to go ashore in dangerous territory to find more

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A band of Welsh druids threatens to shave off Halvar's beard as an offering to the gods, but a game of dominoes may hold the key to defeating them

programme.title: Dork Hunters from Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of heroes try to stop aliens taking over the universe

programme.title: Clipper: Race of Their Lives
programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part

programme.title: My Greek Odyssey
programme.desc: Peter Maneas embarks on a journey through some of the most spectacular and unique Greek islands, exploring the rich culture, history and food of Greece while meeting the locals and those who live there

programme.title: Best of The Tube
programme.desc: Recapping the finest moments from the music show that was hosted by Jools Holland and the late Paula Yates

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: Booker T & the MGs guitarist Steve Cropper, who has worked with artists including Wilson Pickett, Otis Redding and Sam & Dave, talks to Ronnie about his lengthy and colourful career. The pair also discuss the records they both admire

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: The consultants explain how changes in diet could help a 19-year-old dancer deal with Crohn's disease and boost the fertility of a man desperate to become a father. They also help a teenager redefine her relationship with food following gastric bypass surgery. Pixie McKenna examines the effectiveness of energy drinks, and a nationwide survey contributes to research into a natural remedy for insomnia

programme.title: Passport to Pimlico (1949)
programme.desc: The residents of a London suburb discover documents proving their neighbourhood is not part of Britain, and declare independence. Appointing their own head of state, they begin erecting borders as the government resorts to desperate measures to bring the community back under British rule. Ealing comedy, starring Stanley Holloway and Margaret Rutherford

programme.title: A Stitch in Time (1963)
programme.desc: A butcher's bumbling assistant causes no end of accidents at work, the latest of which has landed his boss in hospital. While visiting, he meets a little girl who has not spoken since her parents died, and resolves to put a smile on the orphan's face. Slapstick comedy, starring Norman Wisdom, Edward Chapman, Jerry Desmonde, Lucy Appleby and Jill Melford

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Featuring Woolwich, Deptford and Lewisham. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part seven of eight. The agents find they have travelled 12 days into the future, in which time the ghosts have vanished and Tully has made a dangerous bargain

programme.title: The Ronnie Wood Show
programme.desc: The guitarist talks to his current Faces bandmate Mick Hucknall. The duo perform a version of Bob Dylan's One of Us Must Know, and Ronnie shares his memories of Jimi Hendrix

programme.title: Dispatches
programme.desc: Documentary investigating allegations that a lack of proper controls is allowing financial, physical and even sexual abuse to take place within Britain's mosques. Over a year in the making, this programme exposes how worshippers' generosity can be exploited by religious leaders and how extreme groups can assume control of a community

programme.title: Sapphire and Steel
programme.desc: Part eight of eight. Sapphire makes contact with the Darkness, while Steel tries to make a deal to return the agents to their own time

programme.title: Danger Man
programme.desc: John Drake (Patrick McGoohan), a secret agent working for NATO, travels to different corners of the world in order to prevent crimes that threaten world peace

programme.title: After You've Gone
programme.desc: Sitcom written by My Family creator Fred Barron, starring Nicholas Lyndhurst of only Only Fools and Horses fame as divorcee Jimmy Venables, whose ex-wife leaves to work as a nurse in Africa. He soon finds his efforts to raise his children - Molly, a girl who thinks she's a woman, and Alex, a boy who dresses like one - hindered by mother-in-law Diana, who takes it on herself to move in to the family home. Also in the cast are Celia Imrie and Dani Harmer

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours narrated by Dewyne Lindsay, this time exploring Canary Wharf and Southbank.

programme.title: The Panama Papers
programme.desc: Some of the world's most notorious regimes face sanctions to stop them doing business. Simon Cox reveals how secretive shell companies allow them to continue moving money around

programme.title: Strippers vs Werewolves (2012)
programme.desc: Lapdancer Justice kills a customer when he undergoes a terrifying transformation, and the body is quietly disposed of. The dead man was a werewolf, and at the next full moon, the other members of his pack plan to seek revenge. Justice and her fellow strippers have one month to prepare themselves for a battle to the death. Comedy horror, starring Adele Silva and Robert Englund

programme.title: Operation Chromite (2016)
programme.desc: A squad of South Korean soldiers sent to infiltrate their northern neighbours during the crucial Battle of Incheon. Wartime drama, starring Lee Jung-jae and Liam Neeson

programme.title: Stella Street
programme.desc: Mick decides to dedicate his life to religion, while Joe receives decorating advice from Roger Moore. Comedy, written and performed by John Sessions and Phil Cornwell

programme.desc: The guitarist talks to his current Faces bandmate Mick Hucknall. The duo perform a version of Bob Dylan's One of Us Must Know, and Ronnie shares his memories of Jimi Hendrix

programme.desc: Documentary exploring areas of the capital, beginning with Shooters Hill, Charlton, Greenwich and Blackheath.

programme.title: The Food Hospital
programme.desc: A 36-year-old man with gout visits the hospital, and despite the ailment's age-old associations with elderly men and rich living, he discovers his is hereditary. The doctors hear from a woman seeking a dietary cure for depression, and a mother-of-three who has lived on pancakes and chocolate for two years. Dr Pixie McKenna is also on hand to reveal the truth about detox diets

programme.title: The Fast Lady (1963)
programme.desc: A cycling enthusiast on a modest civil servant's salary gives up his beloved bike to a buy a luxury car to impress a local magistrate's daughter. However, he first has to pass his driving test to stand any chance of winning her heart - and in the process ends up in a wild car-chase after a gang of robbers. Comedy, with Julie Christie, Stanley Baxter, James Robertson Justice, Leslie Phillips and Dick Emery

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

Last in series, starring Martin Freeman, Ken Morley and Peter Serafinowicz

programme.desc: A fighter attempts to save his beloved gym by training a gentle giant for a bare-knuckle fight. Comedy drama, starring Brad Moore, Greg Orvis and Ricky Tomlinson

programme.title: Escape from Sobibor (1987)
programme.desc: New arrivals at a Nazi concentration camp realise they do not have long to live as the Nazi campaign of genocide gathers speed. The commandant threatens to execute one prisoner for every escape attempt - leading the inmates to realise that the only hope is for all 600 of them to break out together. Drama based on the true story of the largest uprising during the Holocaust, starring Alan Arkin, Joanna Pacula and Rutger Hauer

programme.title: Jailhouse Wardress (1981)
programme.desc: A female Nazi prison warden goes into hiding in South America after the Second World War. She oversees a secret facility where genetically engineered sex slaves are created for her fellow war criminals, while also plotting revenge for the Third Reich's defeat. Drama, starring Monica Swinn and Michael Bates

The team also examines one of the most harmful bacteria

programme.title: World Club Series Rugby League Highlights
programme.desc: Leeds Rhinos v North Queensland Cowboys. Action from the World Club Challenge at Headingley, as the Super League champions and NRL winners went head to head in the final match of the series. The Rhinos completed the historic treble of Challenge Cup, League Leaders' Shield and Super League title last season, but began this campaign without three of their most experienced players. Jamie Peacock and Kylie Leuluai have both now retired, while captain Kevin Sinfield has jumped codes to join Yorkshire Carnegie in rugby union. Brian McDermott's side also made a less-than-ideal start to the defence of their Super League crown, losing their opening game against Warrington Wolves 12-10 on this ground

programme.desc: Coverage of the first day of the tournament, taking place at Augusta National in Augusta, Georgia. programme.title: Live Premier League Darts
programme.desc: Coverage from the third night of the tournament from Marshall Arena in Milton Keynes. Last year's tournament was won by Englishman Glen Durrant after a much-disrupted season thanks to the coronavirus pandemic. The competition was stopped after six rounds before resuming in August. Durrant ended up winning last year's final 11-8 against fellow Englishman Nathan Aspinall in final behind closed doors in Coventry
